interface.shortDescription: Ukrainian FOP and individual tax workflows
interface.longDescription: Businesspowers Ukraine provides skills and agent prompts for Ukrainian FOP registration, tax-form selection, single tax, ESV, personal income tax, military levy, reporting, closure, investment income, invoices, acts, and bank-statement workflows. Codex plugin ID: business-ua; Claude Code keeps ua.

Review a Ukrainian tax filing draft.
